title: Junior PMO, Banking (1-year renewable contract)
description:
Dear Applicant,

If you or someone you know is interested, please send the CV to VeronicaE@evolutionjobs.sg (preferred, as I may overlook some CVs due to the high volume).

Please note that visa sponsorship is not available at this time.

JD

PMO, 1-year renewable contract

Consulting

Overview:
We are looking for an experienced PMO professional to support the effective delivery and governance of IT programs. The ideal candidate will have strong program management experience, exceptional stakeholder engagement skills, and the ability to manage financials and reporting for complex technology initiatives.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Oversee program governance, tracking, and reporting to ensure alignment with organizational objectives.
  • Manage and monitor program financials, ensuring budget adherence and accurate forecasting.
  • Prepare, design, and deliver high-quality presentation materials and executive updates.
  • Coordinate across multiple program streams to track progress, risks, and issues.
  • Partner closely with senior stakeholders (C-suite/Managing Directors) to provide insights and facilitate decision-making.
  • Support IT delivery teams with structured PMO frameworks, documentation, and governance processes.
  • Drive continuous improvement of program management practices and delivery effectiveness.

Requirements:

  • Proven experience managing and handling program financials, ideally within IT or technology programs.
  • Strong proficiency in PowerPoint, with the ability to create high-quality, executive-level deliverables.
  • Comfortable engaging and presenting to senior stakeholders (C-suite / MD level).
  • Solid understanding of Program & Delivery Management, especially in IT/Tech environments.
  • Excellent organizational, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

postedCompany.description:
Evolution Recruitment Solutions are an award winning, specialist IT and Digital recruitment consultancy with offices in Singapore, Sydney, UK, Germany and US. Formed in 2000 we have helped thousands of IT and Digital professionals secure their next Permanent, Contract or Interim position with companies ranging from SME to multinationals. Our professional and quality driven approach has led to Evolution being regularly recommended to others.  

Evolution have received a number of awards in recognition of the outstanding training, development and support we provide to our consultants which in turn results in a higher level of service for both applicants and clients:   


Investors In People - Gold  

2nd place The Sunday Times - 100 Best Small Companies to work for 

Best Companies - 3 Stars for Extraordinary Workforce Engagement  

Jobsite 'Best Industry Knowledge'​ Award  

Global Recruiter Asia Pacific Awards:  

- Best in-house training - Best Newcomer 

- APSCo Asia Member of the Year 

- Best Specialist Recruitment Business  

- Best Small Recruitment Business
